request_interpretation.tone: Highly comedic, chaotic, and competitively hostile. Friendly toxicity, mock rage, and streamer banter.
request_interpretation.perspective: Squeex (playing under his in-game name 'Air Coots'), an energetic, expressive, and initially helpless protagonist who develops into a devious mastermind.
request_interpretation.scope: IN: Golf (Golf Gang), Liar's Bar (Liar's Dice & Liar's Deck), and Feather Party. OUT: SpeedRunners, Tetr.io, Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, and Jackbox (Trivia Murder Party 2).
request_interpretation.framing: The Hook: in media res with Squeex's spectacular rocket launcher self-sabotage and Valkyrae screaming death threats. The Build-up: introduction of the Sub-Gifting Wager, evolving Squeex from a victim to a menace. The Mid-Game Tension: psychological warfare in Liar's Bar. The Climax & Resolution: Squeex's dominant run in Feather Party, culminating in post-game financial debt avoidance antics.

storyboard.title: The Rocket Chaos Hook
storyboard.description: Hook the viewer within the first seconds by showcasing the peak of Squeex and Valkyrae's explosive hostility. It promises high-energy comedy, ridiculous blunders, and chaotic PvP action.

storyboard.title: Establishing the Stakes & Early Blunders
storyboard.description: Introduce the cast, the 10-sub-per-hole wager rules, and Squeex's hilarious lack of mechanical skill. Footage shows Squeex immediately flipping a golf cart and failing his very first shots, establishing him as the underdog.

storyboard.title: Escalating Golf Warfare
storyboard.description: Squeex realizes he can't win with skill, so he resorts to violence. Valkyrae targets him with an Elephant Gun, prompting Squeex to retaliate by running her over with a golf cart and blasting her off-course with landmines. Tight editing highlights the rapid back-and-forth griefing.

storyboard.title: The Golf Climax & Leslie's Victory
storyboard.description: Resolve the golf tournament with Valkyrae landing an insane, accidental physics-defying trickshot, followed by Leslie clinching the overall victory. Leslie immediately starts calculating Squeex's heavy debt, setting up Squeex’s financial desperation.
source_events: End of Golf Match and Leslie's Victory
Sub-Gifting Debt Calculation and Transition to Tetr.io
Final vertical hole and golf wager resolution

storyboard.title: Psychological War at Liar's Bar
storyboard.description: Keep viewers hooked by transitioning from physics-based chaos to high-stakes psychological deception. Squeex adapts instantly to Liar's Dice, pulling off a miraculous "Spot On" prediction that forces Valkyrae and Leslie to drink poison.
source_events: Liar’s Bar Pivot and Character Selection

storyboard.title: Sunglasses, Lies, and Empty Chambers
storyboard.description: Squeex takes the psychological meta to the next level in Liar's Deck by physically putting on dark sunglasses to mask his webcam "tells." He gets caught in a massive lie by Ludwig but miraculously survives a trigger pull on an empty chamber, sending the voice chat into a frenzy.
source_events: Squeex's Sunglasses Defense and Valkyrae's Elimination
Squeex Lying and Surviving the Trigger Pull

storyboard.title: Squeex's Sudden Feather Party Domination
storyboard.description: Introduce the final game: Feather Party. Squeex surprises everyone by displaying immediate dominance, carrying Leslie to a team Ice Hockey win by scoring a literal hat trick and loudly comparing himself to Lionel Messi.

storyboard.title: The Lobby Targets Squeex
storyboard.description: Because of Squeex's massive lead, the entire lobby coordinates to target him ("Let's kill him!"). Squeex tries to deceive them by pretending his keyboard is broken, but they ruthlessly hunt him down on the shaky tiles. This keeps viewers on the edge of their seats as Squeex's lead is threatened.
source_events: Shaky Tiles Targeting and Valkyrae Win

storyboard.title: Squeex's Ultimate Golf Redemption
storyboard.description: The ultimate payoff of Squeex's journey. On the final mini-golf course of Feather Party, Squeex sinks a clutch shot to secure the overall tournament championship, completing his transformation from a total joke into the lobby king.

storyboard.title: The Great Sub Debt Settlement
storyboard.description: Settle the real-world stakes with high-tier comedy. Squeex tries to scheme his way out of paying Leslie by delegating his debt to Valkyrae and comically pretending to cry as a "starving streamer." Leslie's stream receives a massive 100-sub donation, wrapping up the video on a highly successful, celebratory, and hilarious note.

editing_brief: Cut this stream down into a single high-quality YouTube video. Tell the complete story of the session -- the stakes and wagers, the rivalries, and how they resolve -- while keeping the funniest and most engaging moments. Open with a hook that sells the video in the first seconds, keep the pacing tight, and end on the most satisfying payoff.
